All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AbstractCircle<N extends Number,C extends AbstractCircle<N,C>>
Base class for circles
AbstractComplex<N extends Number,T extends AbstractComplex<N,T,Q,A,P>,Q,A,P>
Base class for complex numbers
AbstractFraction<N extends Number,T extends AbstractFraction<N,T,Q>,Q extends Number>
Base class for fractions
AbstractPolarForm<N extends Number,T extends AbstractPolarForm<N,T>>
Base class for polar forms
AbstractRectangle<N extends Number,R extends AbstractRectangle<N,R>>
Base class for rectangles
AbstractVector<E extends Number,Q extends Number,V extends AbstractVector<E,Q,V,N,A>,N extends Number,A extends Number>
Base class for vectors
BigCircle
Immutable implementation of a circle which uses BigDecimal as type for its radius
BigCircle.NonNullBigCircleComparator
Comparator which rejects null
BigCircle.NullableBigCircleComparator
Comparator which accepts null
BigComplex
Immutable implementation of a complex number which uses BigDecimal as type for its real and imaginary part
BigComplexQuotientField
Quotient field for BigComplexs
BigDecimalQuotientField
Quotient field for BigDecimals
BigFraction
Immutable implementation of a fraction which uses BigFraction as type for its numerator and denominator
BigFraction.NonNullBigFractionComparator
Comparator which rejects null
BigFraction.NullableBigFractionComparator
Comparator which accepts null
BigGaussian
Immutable implementation of a Gaussian integer which uses BigInteger as type for its real and imaginary part
BigGaussianQuotientField
Quotient field for BigGaussians
BigIntegerQuotientField
Quotient field for BigIntegers
BigPolarForm
Immutable implementation of the polar form of a complex number which uses BigDecimal as type for its coordinates
BigRectangle
Immutable implementation of a rectangle which uses Double as type for its length and width
Circle
Immutable implementation of a circle which uses Double as type for its radius
Circle.NonNullCircleComparator
Comparator which rejects null
Circle.NullableCircleComparator
Comparator which accepts null
Complex
Immutable implementation of a complex number which uses Double as type for its real and imaginary part
ComplexQuotientField
Quotient field for Complexs
DoubleQuotientField
Quotient field for Doubles
Fraction
Immutable implementation of a fraction which uses Long as type for its numerator and denominator
Fraction.NonNullFractionComparator
Comparator which rejects null
Fraction.NullableFractionComparator
Comparator which accepts null
Gaussian
Immutable implementation of a Gaussian integer which uses Long as type for its real and imaginary part
GaussianQuotientField
Quotient field for Gaussians
LongQuotientField
Quotient field for Longs
MatrixEntry<E extends Number>
Entry for matrices
PolarForm
Immutable implementation of the polar form of a complex number which uses Double as type for its coordinates
QuotientField<E extends Number,Q extends Number,A extends Number>
Interface for quotient fields
ReciprocalContext
Immutable data class holding a scale and a MathContext
ReciprocalUtils
Class for global constants
Rectangle
Immutable implementation of a rectangle which uses Double as type for its length and width
VectorEntry<E extends Number>
Entry for vectors
